name: Slow Cooker Bouillabaisse (9384 Me )
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boneless fish fillets, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the slow cooker pot.
2. Stir to blend and cover.
3. Cook on low for about 3 hours.
4. Ladle into soup bowls to serve. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
